name: Bound-aware Discovery Engine

phases.name: F1: Bound-aware codegen
phases.description: Pass stage.outputBoundK to butterfly. Replace if k>32 with if boundK≤2. Generalizes AC-6 for ANY field.

study.notes: Add boundK:Nat:=0 to lowerDIFButterflyByReduction:173. Change dispatch:201 from if k>32 to if boundK≤2&&boundK>0. Pass stage.outputBoundK from lowerStageVerified:364. Default 0 = backward compat.

blocks.name: Bound-aware codegen
blocks.gate: validation PASS + test with k=31 field with bounds ≤ 2 activates conditionalSub

phases.name: F4: twoStepGoldilocks in NTTStrategy
phases.description: Add .twoStepGoldilocks to NTTStrategy inductive. 3 pattern matches to update. No formal proofs broken.

study.notes: Add constructor:36-46, strategyOpCount case:50-65 (inner=6 shift stages, outer=logN-6 mul stages), selectBestStrategy case:171 (only for goldilocks_p && n>=128). ~15 LOC total.

blocks.name: NTTStrategy extension
blocks.gate: lake build + selectBestStrategy includes twoStep as candidate

phases.name: F2: conditionalSub in MixedNodeOp
phases.description: Add 23rd constructor. ~300 LOC mechanical across 9+ files. CRITICAL: mixed_extractable_sound (188 LOC proof).

study.notes: Pattern: copy harveyReduce arm, change semantics to if v a >= p then v a - p else v a. 25+ functions need new arm (inventory in §10.2). mixed_extractable_sound is the hardest proof (~10 LOC new arm). Most BitVecBridge/VerifiedSIMDCodeGen proofs auto-repair via <;> simp.

blocks.name: MixedNodeOp conditionalSub
blocks.gate: lake build 0 errors + 0 new sorry + benchmark validation PASS + sorry count ≤ current

phases.name: F3: Bound-aware sideCondCheck
phases.description: New layer boundAwareEqStep in tieredStep. First rule: reduceGate → conditionalSub when boundK ≤ 2. Enables automatic discovery.

study.notes: Reutiliza buildBoundLookup (BoundPropagation.lean:72). sideCondCheck ya evaluado en applyRuleAtF (MixedSaturation.lean:32-35). Add boundAwareEqStep after crossStep in tieredStep. ~40 LOC. First rule: reduceGate→conditionalSub when boundK≤2.

Add stark252Config to OptimizedNTTPipeline. NO field-specific rules. Run optimizeReduction stark252Config arm_cortex_a76. Verify e-graph discovers optimal reduction automatically. THIS IS THE VISION TEST.

blocks.name: Bound-aware discovery + Stark252 test
blocks.gate: optimizeReduction discovers conditionalSub for bounded inputs + Stark252 automatic discovery PASS

correctness: conditionalSub semantics: if v a >= p then v a - p else v a
boundK=0 (default) produces identical behavior to v3.10.1
performance: Goldilocks ≤ v3.10.1 (no regression from constructor addition)
quality: No field-specific if-statements in new code (bound-aware, not field-aware)

properties.description: boundK=0 produces identical codegen to v3.10.1
boundK≤2 activates conditionalSub for ANY field
evalMixedOp(.conditionalSub a p) = if v a >= p then v a - p else v a
Stark252 optimal reduction discovered without field-specific rules

critical_path: BF1(1d) → BF2(3-4d) → BF3(1d) = 5-6 days. BF4(0.5d) parallel.
